title: NIO Q1 2024 Earnings: Financial Results
text: NIO announced unaudited financial results for first quarter ended March 31, 2024 on June 6, 2024. Vehicle deliveries were 30,053 units, consisting of 17,809 premium smart electric SUVs and 12,244 premium smart electric sedans, representing 3.2% decrease from Q1 2023 and 39.9% decrease from Q4 2023. Vehicle sales reached RMB 8,381.3 million (US$1,160.8 million), down 9.1% from Q1 2023 and 45.7% from Q4 2023. Balance of cash and cash equivalents, restricted cash, short-term investment and long-term time deposits totaled RMB 45.3 billion (US$6.3 billion) as of March 31, 2024. For Q2 2024 guidance: deliveries between 54,000-56,000 units, up 129.6%-138.1% from Q2 2023, with total revenues between RMB 16,587-17,135 million (US$2,297-2,373 million), up 89.1%-95.3% from Q2 2023.
